title: format_receipt_timestamp output strings are undocumented unstable API
description: format_receipt_timestamp and format_receipt_timestamp_at are pub. Users will match on exact strings ('Today', 'Jan 15', 'Mon 14:00') in UI code. The doc does not say these strings are non-stable. If the format changes (e.g., adding year to old dates, or i18n), callers break silently. Either document strings as stable API or add #[doc(hidden)] on the _at variant and note strings may change in the public function doc.
